title: wedelia cronquistii
intro: Wedelia cronquistii, also known as Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The leaves and flowers of Wedelia cronquistii can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
